name: SonicWall Skill
description: Provides step-by-step SonicWall configuration instructions using official SonicWall documentation as the primary source. Covers SonicWall firewalls (TZ, NSa, NSsp, NSv series), Cloud Secure Edge (CSE) ZTNA/SASE platform, and Network Security Manager (NSM) centralised management. Always searches official docs first. Prioritises GUI over CLI. Provides accurate, verified, beginner-friendly instructions.
